target_schema.live_transition_definition: copied transition status is permitted and copied governing rule version is active at the represented source state
target_schema.probabilistic_kernel_definition: copy each finite source support branch and exact source-declared weight
target_schema.history_definition: copy and reflect every material event order causal provenance revision modification ancestry and path fact

results.result: the represented target live-transition graph is isomorphic to every admitted deterministic source graph
the represented target kernels are finite-support measure-preserving copies of every admitted source kernel
the event map is an order embedding and preserves and reflects all registered material history and path relations
revision retraction and supersession records agree with copied before and after state snapshots
accepted rule-version changes alter later target live transitions while rejected changes do not

results.scope: finite deterministic and finite-support probabilistic S_core dynamics
finite explicit S_core history path revision and rule-version records

nonclaims: any W3 or W5 construction or assembly obligation is proved
the remaining W4 obstruction or negative-control obligations are resolved
any complete Pres_i predicate is proved
a complete uniform FARA witness constructor exists
FARA faithfully represents S_core or S_IRD
PB-001 is sufficient necessary independent minimal or complete
any representation universality necessity minimality equivalence uniqueness or impossibility theorem is established
proof-assistant verification or independent proof review has occurred
next_required_artifact: W3 global witness recovery semantics coherence machinery uniformity composition and assembly proof-or-obstruction package
